name: cwp-claude-progress
description: Auto-updates PROGRESS.md at the end of each session. Requires a PROGRESS.md file in the root of the project.

hooks.prompt:
Check if a PROGRESS.md file exists in the project root. If it does NOT exist, do nothing.

If it DOES exist, and you made meaningful code changes this session (not just Q&A or exploration), append a brief timestamped entry with:
- The date
- What changed
- Suggested next steps

Keep entries to 2-3 lines. Do not rewrite existing entries.
